atten4.ptxt: When DTC B1650/32 is detected as a result of troubleshooting for "AIRBAG SYSTEM", perform troubleshooting for the occupant classification system.

step3.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Check the DTCs by following the prompts on the tester screen.

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the intelligent tester operator's manual for further details.

step3.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Clear the DTCs by following the prompts on the tester screen.

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the intelligent tester operator's manual for further details.
